docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT GCI, INC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,623.58 FILED BY S & R DRYWALL, INC AS TO DEFENDANT GCI, INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-10-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, ONLY. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY TAMMY BURTON--ACCOUNTING/HR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
